channel.title: Water Forever | LinkedIn Competitor Feed
channel.description: Daily LinkedIn competitor intelligence from Water Forever

item.title: IDE Technologies — New project win
item.description: IDE Technologies was unanimously selected by the Nueces River Authority Board to develop the Harbor Island Desalination Facility in South Texas, set to become the largest seawater desalination facility in the Western Hemisphere at 100 million gallons per day.

item.title: Xylem — New financials
item.description: Xylem issued its inaugural Blue Bond, becoming the first U.S. corporate to bring this labeled financing to market, supporting investments in water stewardship, resilience, and access to WASH.

item.title: Fluence Corporation — Research report announcements
item.description: Fluence Corporation released an on-demand webinar on when high-rate anaerobic systems make sense for industrial wastewater treatment, featuring discussion of its EFC technology.

item.title: DuPont Water Solutions — Case study announcements
item.description: DuPont Water Solutions published a case study in Treatment Plant Operator magazine on its OxyMem MABR installation in Elmira, Ontario, showing how modular drop-in units increased wastewater treatment capacity without plant expansion.

item.title: Saltech Desalination — New product
item.description: Saltech Desalination introduced its Stream 12/24v Framed Series, a compact energy-efficient desalination system designed for marine and offshore applications, serving the African market.

item.title: Berghof Membranes — Research report announcements
item.description: Berghof Membranes announced a technical online workshop on tubular ultrafiltration for industrial wastewater, covering best-fit criteria, design guidelines, and O&M essentials.

item.title: Black & Veatch — Research report announcements
item.description: Black & Veatch is hosting an ASDWA webinar walking through the EPA May 2026 proposed PFAS rule, covering the new compliance extension framework and exemption application process.

item.title: Aquatech — New project win
item.description: Aquatech will supply the largest direct lithium extraction unit ever deployed in North America for Prairie Lithium's Saskatchewan production facility, deploying its Li-Pro LSS technology under the PEARL licensing platform.
